notes.runtime: Workers are invoked via Claude Code's Agent tool — subagent_type='general-purpose', prompt = body of system_prompt_path file + task. No Anthropic Managed Agents API.
notes.model_tiering: Opus for CEO + GC (judgment-heavy). Haiku for execution roles (CTO/CFO/CMO/COO).
notes.nested_fanout: Every worker has Agent tool — workers can spawn their own sub-Agents in parallel (research streams, peer officer calls, parallel variants). Cap 3 per call inside a worker. Driver still expects ONE consolidated answer per worker invocation.
notes.mcp: Configured in the user's Claude Code MCP settings separately, not declared here.
notes.coordinator: No separate coordinator agent. The Driver itself routes tasks per leader-driver.md §3 table.
